checkout.title: Checkout
checkout.success: Thank you! Your payment was accepted.
checkout.successHint: You will receive a confirmation email when your order is registered.
checkout.paymentNotReady: The payment form is still loading. Wait a moment and try again.
checkout.paymentProcessing: Payment is processing. You will be redirected or receive a confirmation email.
checkout.paymentLoading: Connecting to Stripe… The Pay button enables once the form is ready.
checkout.paymentLoadError: Could not load the payment form (network, ad blocker, or Stripe key).

auth.confirmSuccess: Your registration is confirmed. You can now sign in.
auth.adminRedirect: You are an administrator: please use the admin panel.

accountPayments.emptyDescription: Your future cards will appear here after your first successful payment.

accountPayments.addDescription: Fill in only the required details for secure display.
